seichou.desc: Raises the user's Attack and Sp. Atk by 1 stage each. Raised by 2 stages each in harsh sunlight.

sooraabiimu.name: Solar Beam
sooraabiimu.desc: Charges on the first turn and attacks on the second turn. In harsh sunlight, it attacks immediately with no charge turn; in rain, snow, or sandstorm, its power is halved (1/2).

dokunokona.name: Poison Powder
dokunokona.desc: Poisons the target. No effect on targets holding Safety Goggles, with the Overcoat Ability, or that are Grass-type, Steel-type, or Poison-type.

shibiregona.name: Stun Spore
shibiregona.desc: Paralyzes the target. No effect on Pokémon holding Safety Goggles, with the Overcoat Ability, or that are Grass-type or Electric-type.

nemurigona.name: Sleep Powder
nemurigona.desc: Puts the target to sleep. No effect on targets holding Safety Goggles, with the Overcoat Ability, or that are Grass-type.

hanabiranomai.name: Petal Dance
hanabiranomai.desc: The user becomes locked in (rampage) and attacks for 2-3 consecutive turns. Afterward, the user becomes confused for 1-4 turns.

itowohaku.name: String Shot
itowohaku.desc: Lowers the target's Speed by 2 stages.

honoonouzu.name: Fire Spin
honoonouzu.desc: Traps the target (4-5 turns). While trapped, the target takes 1/8 of its max HP in damage at the end of each turn, and non-Ghost-type Pokémon cannot switch out.

denjiha.name: Thunder Wave
denjiha.desc: Paralyzes the target. No effect on Ground-type or Electric-type Pokémon.

kaminari.name: Thunder
kaminari.desc: 30% chance to paralyze the target. Never misses in rain; accuracy drops to 50% in harsh sunlight. Hits even when the target is using Sky Drop, Bounce, or Fly.

jishin.name: Earthquake
jishin.desc: Also hits targets in the semi-invulnerable state of Dig, dealing double damage. Power is halved (1/2) on Grassy Terrain.

jiware.name: Fissure
jiware.desc: Causes the target to faint in one hit. No effect on Flying-type Pokémon, but otherwise ignores type matchups.

anawohoru.name: Dig
anawohoru.desc: On the first turn the user digs underground; on the second turn it attacks. While underground, the user avoids most moves except a few such as Earthquake.

dokudoku.name: Toxic
dokudoku.desc: Badly poisons the target (damage increases each turn: 1/16, 2/16, 3/16…). Never misses when used by a Poison-type. No effect on Poison- or Steel-type Pokémon.

saikokineshisu.name: Psychic
saikokineshisu.desc: 10% chance to lower the target's Sp. Def by 1 stage.

kousokuidou.name: Agility
kousokuidou.desc: Raises the user's Speed by 2 stages.

denkousekka.name: Quick Attack
denkousekka.desc: A priority +1 move that strikes first.

naitoheddo.name: Night Shade
naitoheddo.desc: Deals fixed damage equal to the user's level. No effect on Normal-type Pokémon, but otherwise ignores type matchups.

iyanaoto.name: Screech
iyanaoto.desc: A sound move. Lowers the target's Defense by 2 stages. Bypasses Substitute.

kagebunshin.name: Double Team
kagebunshin.desc: Raises the user's evasiveness by 1 stage.

jikosaisei.name: Recover
jikosaisei.desc: Restores 50% of the user's maximum HP.

chiisakunaru.name: Minimize
chiisakunaru.desc: Raises the user's evasiveness by 2 stages. However, certain moves such as Body Slam, Heat Crash, and Flying Press never miss and deal double damage against the user.

hikarinokabe.name: Light Screen
hikarinokabe.desc: For 5 turns, halves damage from the opponent's special attacks. With multiple allies (Double Battles), reduces to 2/3 instead. Critical hits are not reduced. Remains in effect after switching.

kuroikiri.name: Haze
kuroikiri.desc: Resets the stat stage changes of all Pokémon.

rifurekutaa.name: Reflect
rifurekutaa.desc: For 5 turns, halves damage from the opponent's physical attacks. With multiple allies (Double Battles), reduces to 2/3 instead. Critical hits are not reduced. Remains in effect after switching.

kiaidame.name: Focus Energy
kiaidame.desc: Raises the user's critical-hit ratio by 2 stages. Fails if already in effect.

takinobori.name: Waterfall
takinobori.desc: 20% chance to make the target flinch.

dowasure.name: Amnesia
dowasure.desc: Raises the user's Sp. Def by 2 stages.

tobihizageri.name: High Jump Kick
tobihizageri.desc: If it misses or fails, the user loses HP equal to half (1/2) of its maximum HP.

hebinirami.name: Glare
hebinirami.desc: Paralyzes the target. No effect on Electric-type Pokémon.

kyuuketsu.name: Leech Life
kyuuketsu.desc: Restores the user's HP by 1/2 of the damage dealt.

goddobaado.name: Sky Attack
goddobaado.desc: Critical-hit ratio +1. Charges on the first turn and attacks on the second. 30% chance to make the target flinch.

henshin.name: Transform
henshin.desc: Transforms into the target, copying everything except HP, held item, and status conditions. All copied moves have 5 PP. The transformation is undone upon switching out.

tokeru.name: Acid Armor
tokeru.desc: Raises the user's Defense by 2 stages.

nemuru.name: Rest
nemuru.desc: Fully restores HP and cures any status condition, then the user falls asleep for 2 turns, waking on the third turn.

iwanadare.name: Rock Slide
iwanadare.desc: 30% chance to make the target flinch.

toraiatakku.name: Tri Attack
toraiatakku.desc: 20% chance to inflict one of paralysis, burn, or freeze on the target (chosen at random).

ikarinomaeba.name: Super Fang
ikarinomaeba.desc: Cuts the target's HP by half of its remaining HP (deals 1 damage when the target has 1 HP). No effect on Ghost-type Pokémon, but otherwise ignores type matchups.

migawari.name: Substitute
migawari.desc: The user spends 1/4 of its maximum HP to create a substitute that takes hits in its place. The substitute disappears once it has taken damage equal to 1/4 of the user's maximum HP. Sound moves and similar moves still hit the user directly.

dorobou.name: Thief
dorobou.desc: Steals the target's held item, but only if the user is not holding an item.

ibiki.name: Snore
ibiki.desc: A sound move. Can only be used while the user is asleep. 30% chance to make the target flinch. Bypasses Substitute.

noroi.name: Curse
noroi.desc: If the user is Ghost-type: it spends 1/2 of its maximum HP to curse the target (the target loses 1/4 of its maximum HP each turn). Otherwise: lowers the user's Speed by 1 stage and raises its Attack and Defense by 1 stage each.

jitabata.name: Flail
jitabata.desc: The lower the user's remaining HP, the higher the power (20–200).

watahoushi.name: Cotton Spore
watahoushi.desc: Lowers the target's Speed by 2 stages. No effect on Grass-type Pokémon, those with the Overcoat Ability, or those holding Safety Goggles.

kishikaisei.name: Reversal
kishikaisei.desc: The lower the user's remaining HP, the higher the power (20–200).

urami.name: Spite
urami.desc: Reduces the PP of the target's last used move by 4.

mamoru.name: Protect
mamoru.desc: A priority +4 move that goes first. Completely blocks the target's move for one turn. Success rate drops to 1/3 when used consecutively.

mahhapanchi.name: Mach Punch
mahhapanchi.desc: A priority +1 move that goes first. Power is boosted 1.2x by the Iron Fist Ability.

kowaikao.name: Scary Face
kowaikao.desc: Lowers the target's Speed by 2 stages.

tenshinokissu.name: Sweet Kiss
tenshinokissu.desc: Confuses the target for 1 to 4 turns.

haradaiko.name: Belly Drum
haradaiko.desc: Uses up half of the user's max HP to maximize its Attack stat.

dorokake.name: Mud-Slap
dorokake.desc: 100% chance to lower the target's accuracy by 1 stage.

makibishi.name: Spikes
makibishi.desc: A trap that damages the target when it switches in. Can be stacked up to 3 times: 1 layer = max HP/8, 2 layers = max HP/6, 3 layers = max HP/4. No effect on Flying-type Pokémon or Pokémon with the Levitate Ability.

michizure.name: Destiny Bond
michizure.desc: The user enters the Destiny Bond state. If the user is knocked out by the target's attack before the user's next turn, the target also faints.

horobinouta.name: Perish Song
horobinouta.desc: A sound move. After 3 turns, all Pokémon that were on the field when it was used (including the user) faint. Pokémon that switch out lose the effect. Hits through Substitute.

kogoerukaze.name: Icy Wind
kogoerukaze.desc: 100% chance to lower the target's Speed by 1 stage.

mikiri.name: Detect
mikiri.desc: A priority +4 move that goes first. Completely blocks the target's move for one turn. Success rate drops to 1/3 when used consecutively.

boonrasshu.name: Bone Rush
boonrasshu.desc: Hits 2 to 5 times in a row.

rokkuon.name: Lock-On
rokkuon.desc: On the next turn, the user's move never misses against the target it was used on.

gekirin.name: Outrage
gekirin.desc: The user enters a rampaging state, attacking for 2 to 3 turns in a row. Afterward, it becomes confused for 1 to 4 turns.

sunaarashi.name: Sandstorm
sunaarashi.desc: Changes the weather to a sandstorm for 5 turns. Pokémon other than Rock, Ground, and Steel types take damage equal to max HP/16 each turn. Rock-type Pokémon get a 1.5x boost to Sp. Def.

gigadorein.name: Giga Drain
gigadorein.desc: Restores the user's HP by 1/2 of the damage dealt.

koraeru.name: Endure
koraeru.desc: A priority +4 move that goes first. Endures with 1 HP even from an attack that would knock the user out. Success rate drops to 1/3 when used consecutively.

amaeru.name: Charm
amaeru.desc: Lowers the target's Attack by 2 stages.

ibaru.name: Swagger
ibaru.desc: Confuses the target for 1 to 4 turns, but raises the target's Attack by 2 stages.

haganenotsubasa.name: Steel Wing
haganenotsubasa.desc: 10% chance to raise the user's Defense by 1 stage.

kuroimanazashi.name: Mean Look
kuroimanazashi.desc: Prevents the target from fleeing or switching out, except for Ghost-type Pokémon. The effect ends when the user leaves the field.

meromero.name: Attract
meromero.desc: When the target is the opposite gender of the user, it becomes infatuated. While infatuated, there is a 50% chance the target cannot attack the user. Fails if the user and target are the same gender, or if either one's gender is unknown.

negoto.name: Sleep Talk
negoto.desc: Can only be used while the user is asleep. Randomly uses one of the user's known moves. Only this move consumes PP.

iyashinosuzu.name: Heal Bell
iyashinosuzu.desc: A sound move. Cures the status conditions of the user and all allied Pokémon. The effect works even on allies behind a Substitute.

shinpinomamori.name: Safeguard
shinpinomamori.desc: Protects the user's side with Safeguard for 5 turns. Blocks status conditions and confusion. Remains in effect even after switching out.

itamiwake.name: Pain Split
itamiwake.desc: Sets the HP of both the user and the target to the average of their remaining HP (added together and divided by 2).

bakuretsupanchi.name: Dynamic Punch
bakuretsupanchi.desc: 100% chance to confuse the target for 1 to 4 turns. Power is boosted 1.2x by the Iron Fist Ability.

batontatchi.name: Baton Pass
batontatchi.desc: Switches out with an ally, passing on stat changes and other effects.

ankooru.name: Encore
ankooru.desc: For 3 turns, the target can only repeat the move it just used. The effect ends when the move's PP reaches 0.

kousokusupin.name: Rapid Spin
kousokusupin.desc: Removes binding effects on the user (such as Whirlpool, Bind, Wrap, Leech Seed, etc.) and entry hazards on the user's side (such as Stealth Rock, Spikes, Toxic Spikes, Sticky Web, etc.). After attacking, 100% chance to raise the user's Speed by 1 stage.

amaikaori.name: Sweet Scent
amaikaori.desc: Lowers the target's evasiveness by 2 stages.

aianteeru.name: Iron Tail
aianteeru.desc: 30% chance to lower the target's Defense by 1 stage.

asanohizashi.name: Morning Sun
asanohizashi.desc: Restored HP varies with the weather: normal = max HP/2, harsh sunlight = 2/3, rain/snow/sandstorm = 1/4.

kougousei.name: Synthesis
kougousei.desc: Restored HP varies with the weather: normal = max HP/2, harsh sunlight = 2/3, rain/snow/sandstorm = 1/4.

tsukinohikari.name: Moonlight
tsukinohikari.desc: Restored HP varies with the weather: normal = max HP/2, harsh sunlight = 2/3, rain/snow/sandstorm = 1/4.

kurosuchoppu.name: Cross Chop
kurosuchoppu.desc: Raises the critical-hit ratio by 1 stage.

amagoi.name: Rain Dance
amagoi.desc: Changes the weather to rain for 5 turns. Water-type moves get a 1.5x boost, and Fire-type moves are halved.

nihonbare.name: Sunny Day
nihonbare.desc: Changes the weather to harsh sunlight for 5 turns. Fire-type moves get a 1.5x boost, Water-type moves are halved, and freezing is prevented.

kamikudaku.name: Crunch
kamikudaku.desc: 20% chance to lower the target's Defense by 1 stage.

miraakooto.name: Mirror Coat
miraakooto.desc: Priority -5 (moves last). Reflects 2x the damage of the foe's special attack. In Double Battles, only the last special attack taken counts. No effect on Dark-type Pokémon, but otherwise ignores type matchup.

jikoanji.name: Psych Up
jikoanji.desc: Copies the foe's stat stage changes onto the user.

genshinochikara.name: Ancient Power
genshinochikara.desc: 10% chance to raise the user's Speed, Sp. Def, Sp. Atk, Defense, and Attack by 1 stage each.

shadoobooru.name: Shadow Ball
shadoobooru.desc: 20% chance to lower the foe's Sp. Def by 1 stage.

miraiyochi.name: Future Sight
miraiyochi.desc: Deals damage 2 turns later. If the user switches out, the damage hits the Pokémon in the same position. Type matchup applies.

uzushio.name: Whirlpool
uzushio.desc: Traps the foe (4–5 turns), dealing 1/8 of max HP at the end of each turn. Non-Ghost-type Pokémon cannot switch out. Also hits foes that are underwater (using Dive), with 2x damage.

fukurodataki.name: Beat Up
fukurodataki.desc: Strikes consecutively once for each healthy Pokémon in the party (including the user).

nekodamashi.name: Fake Out
nekodamashi.desc: Priority +3 (moves first). 100% chance to cause flinch. Only succeeds on the user's first turn after entering battle.

sawagu.name: Uproar
sawagu.desc: Sound move. Attacks for 3 consecutive turns, during which no Pokémon can fall asleep. Bypasses Substitute.

takuwaeru.name: Stockpile
takuwaeru.desc: Raises the user's Defense and Sp. Def by 1 stage each. Increases the Stockpile count by 1 (up to 3). Affects the effects of Swallow and Spit Up.

hakidasu.name: Spit Up
hakidasu.desc: Power increases with the Stockpile count (1=100 / 2=200 / 3=300). The Defense and Sp. Def stages gained from Stockpile are reset. Fails if Stockpile has not been used.

nomikomu.name: Swallow
nomikomu.desc: Restores HP based on the Stockpile count (1=1/4 of max HP, 2=1/2 of max HP, 3=full HP). The Defense and Sp. Def stages gained from Stockpile are reset. Fails if Stockpile has not been used.

ichamon.name: Torment
ichamon.desc: After use, the foe cannot use the same move twice in a row.

odateru.name: Flatter
odateru.desc: Confuses the foe for 1–4 turns, but raises the foe's Sp. Atk by 1 stage.

onibi.name: Will-O-Wisp
onibi.desc: Burns the foe. No effect on Fire-type Pokémon.

okimiyage.name: Memento
okimiyage.desc: The user faints, but lowers the foe's Attack and Sp. Atk by 2 stages each.

karagenki.name: Facade
karagenki.desc: While the user is poisoned, paralyzed, or burned, power is doubled. Not affected by the Attack halving from burn.

kiaipanchi.name: Focus Punch
kiaipanchi.desc: Priority -3 (moves last). Fails if the user is hit by a move before attacking. Power is boosted 1.2x by the Iron Fist Ability.

konoyubitomare.name: Follow Me
konoyubitomare.desc: Priority +2 (moves first). That turn, the user takes all of the foes' moves aimed at allies (excluding spread/multi-target moves). For Double Battles.

juuden.name: Charge
juuden.desc: Doubles the power of the user's next Electric-type move (one time only). Also raises the user's Sp. Def by 1 stage.

chouhatsu.name: Taunt
chouhatsu.desc: For 3 turns, the foe can only use attacking moves (status moves are sealed).

tedasuke.name: Helping Hand
tedasuke.desc: Priority +5 (moves first). For 1 turn, raises an ally's move power by 1.5x.

torikku.name: Trick
torikku.desc: Swaps held items between the user and the foe. Succeeds even if only one side holds an item.

narikiri.name: Role Play
narikiri.desc: Changes the user's Ability to match the foe's. Signature Abilities cannot be copied.

negaigoto.name: Wish
negaigoto.desc: At the end of the turn after next, restores 50% of max HP. Also targets the Pokémon that switches into that position.

newoharu.name: Ingrain
newoharu.desc: Restores 1/16 of max HP each turn, but the user can no longer switch out. Ground-type moves can also hit the user even if it is Flying-type or has the Levitate Ability.

bakajikara.name: Superpower
bakajikara.desc: After attacking, lowers the user's Attack and Defense by 1 stage each.

risaikuru.name: Recycle
risaikuru.desc: Recovers the item the user last consumed. Fails if the user is holding an item.

kawarawari.name: Brick Break
kawarawari.desc: Removes the foe's Aurora Veil, Reflect, and Light Screen before attacking.

akubi.name: Yawn
akubi.desc: Makes the foe drowsy, putting it to sleep at the end of the next turn. The effect is removed if that Pokémon switches out. Never misses, ignoring accuracy and evasiveness.

hatakiotosu.name: Knock Off
hatakiotosu.desc: If the foe is holding an item, power is boosted 1.5x and the item is knocked away. The item is restored after the battle.

gamushara.name: Endeavor
gamushara.desc: Deals damage equal to the foe's remaining HP minus the user's remaining HP. Fails if the foe's HP is less than or equal to the user's. No effect on Ghost-type Pokémon; otherwise ignores type matchup.

funka.name: Eruption
funka.desc: Power decreases as the user's remaining HP gets lower (1–150).

sukirusuwappu.name: Skill Swap
sukirusuwappu.desc: Swaps Abilities between the user and the foe. Signature Abilities cannot be swapped.

fuuin.name: Imprison
fuuin.desc: The user becomes sealed. Until it leaves the field, the foe cannot use any move that the user knows.

daibingu.name: Dive
daibingu.desc: Dives underwater on the first turn and attacks on the second. While underwater, the user avoids all moves except certain ones such as Surf and Whirlpool.

fezadansu.name: Feather Dance
fezadansu.desc: Lowers the foe's Attack by 2 stages.

bureizukikku.name: Blaze Kick
bureizukikku.desc: Critical-hit ratio +1. 10% chance to burn the foe.

dokudokunokiba.name: Poison Fang
dokudokunokiba.desc: 50% chance to badly poison (toxic) the target. Toxic damage starts at 1/16 and increases each turn. Resets to 1/16 on switching out.

bureikukuroo.name: Crush Claw
bureikukuroo.desc: 50% chance to lower the target's Defense by 1 stage.

burasutobaan.name: Blast Burn
burasutobaan.desc: The user must recharge and cannot act on the next turn.

haidorokanon.name: Hydro Cannon
haidorokanon.desc: The user must recharge and cannot act on the next turn.

komettopanchi.name: Meteor Mash
komettopanchi.desc: 20% chance to raise the user's Attack by 1 stage. Power is boosted 1.2x by the Iron Fist Ability.

uezaabooru.name: Weather Ball
uezaabooru.desc: Becomes Fire-type in harsh sunlight, Water-type in rain, Ice-type in snow, and Rock-type in sandstorm, with power doubled (2x).

usonaki.name: Fake Tears
usonaki.desc: Lowers the target's Sp. Def by 2 stages.

oobaahiito.name: Overheat
oobaahiito.desc: After attacking, lowers the user's Sp. Atk by 2 stages.

gansekifuuji.name: Rock Tomb
gansekifuuji.desc: 100% chance to lower the target's Speed by 1 stage.

kinzokuon.name: Metal Sound
kinzokuon.desc: Sound-based move. Lowers the target's Sp. Def by 2 stages.

kusuguru.name: Tickle
kusuguru.desc: Lowers the target's Attack by 1 stage and Defense by 1 stage.

kosumopawaa.name: Cosmic Power
kosumopawaa.desc: Raises the user's Defense by 1 stage and Sp. Def by 1 stage.

shiofuki.name: Water Spout
shiofuki.desc: Power decreases the lower the user's remaining HP (1 to 150).

shadoopanchi.name: Shadow Punch
shadoopanchi.desc: Never misses, ignoring accuracy and evasiveness. Power is boosted 1.2x by the Iron Fist Ability.

jintsuuriki.name: Extrasensory
jintsuuriki.desc: 10% chance to make the target flinch.

sunajigoku.name: Sand Tomb
sunajigoku.desc: Traps the target (4 to 5 turns). While trapped, the target takes damage equal to 1/8 of its max HP at the end of each turn and cannot switch out unless it is a Ghost-type.

zettaireido.name: Sheer Cold
zettaireido.desc: Causes the target to faint in one hit (OHKO). No effect on Ice-type Pokémon. When used by a non-Ice-type Pokémon, its accuracy drops to 20%.

dakuryuu.name: Muddy Water
dakuryuu.desc: 30% chance to lower the target's accuracy by 1 stage.

tanemashingan.name: Bullet Seed
tanemashingan.desc: Hits 2 to 5 times in a row.

tsubamegaeshi.name: Aerial Ace
tsubamegaeshi.desc: Never misses, ignoring accuracy and evasiveness.

tsurarabari.name: Icicle Spear
tsurarabari.desc: Hits 2 to 5 times in a row.

teppeki.name: Iron Defense
teppeki.desc: Raises the user's Defense by 2 stages.

toosenbou.name: Block
toosenbou.desc: Prevents the target from fleeing or switching out, unless it is a Ghost-type. The effect ends when the user leaves the field.

tooboe.name: Howl
tooboe.desc: Sound-based move. Raises the Attack of the user and all allies by 1 stage.

haadopuranto.name: Frenzy Plant
haadopuranto.desc: The user must recharge and cannot act on the next turn.

birudoappu.name: Bulk Up
birudoappu.desc: Raises the user's Attack by 1 stage and Defense by 1 stage.

tobihaneru.name: Bounce
tobihaneru.desc: On the first turn the user flies up; on the second turn it attacks. 30% chance to paralyze. While airborne, the user is unaffected by all moves except a few such as Smack Down, Thunder, and Hurricane.

maddoshotto.name: Mud Shot
maddoshotto.desc: 100% chance to lower the target's Speed by 1 stage.

hoshigaru.name: Covet
hoshigaru.desc: Steals the target's held item, but only if the target is not holding an item.

borutekkaa.name: Volt Tackle
borutekkaa.desc: The user takes recoil damage equal to 1/3 of the damage dealt. 10% chance to paralyze the target.

meisou.name: Calm Mind
meisou.desc: Raises the user's Sp. Atk by 1 stage and Sp. Def by 1 stage.

ryuunomai.name: Dragon Dance
ryuunomai.desc: Raises the user's Attack by 1 stage and Speed by 1 stage.

rokkuburasuto.name: Rock Blast
rokkuburasuto.desc: Hits 2 to 5 times in a row.

mizunohadou.name: Water Pulse
mizunohadou.desc: 20% chance to confuse the target for 1 to 4 turns.

haneyasume.name: Roost
haneyasume.desc: Restores HP by 1/2 of max HP. During that turn, the user is not treated as a Flying-type.

juuryoku.name: Gravity
juuryoku.desc: For 5 turns, the accuracy of all Pokémon is multiplied by 1.67x. Ground-type moves hit Pokémon with Levitate or Flying-type. Floating moves such as Fly and Bounce are negated.

aamuhanmaa.name: Hammer Arm
aamuhanmaa.desc: After attacking, lowers the user's Speed by 1 stage. Power is boosted 1.2x by the Iron Fist Ability.

jairobooru.name: Gyro Ball
jairobooru.desc: Power increases the lower the target's Speed is compared to the user (25 × target's Speed ÷ user's Speed + 1, max 150).

iyashinonegai.name: Healing Wish
iyashinonegai.desc: The user faints in exchange for fully restoring the HP and curing the status conditions of the next Pokémon sent out (PP is not restored).

feinto.name: Feint
feinto.desc: A first-strike move with priority +2. Lifts protection moves such as King's Shield, Baneful Bunker, Detect, and Protect, then attacks.

tsuibamu.name: Pluck
tsuibamu.desc: Steals the target's held Berry and immediately eats it itself.

oikaze.name: Tailwind
oikaze.desc: For 4 turns, doubles the Speed of the user and its allies.

tsubowotsuku.name: Acupressure
tsubowotsuku.desc: Randomly raises one of the user's stats by 2 stages (one of Attack/Defense/Sp. Atk/Sp. Def/Speed/accuracy/evasiveness).

metarubaasuto.name: Metal Burst
metarubaasuto.desc: Reflects 1.5x the final damage taken. Fails if no damage was taken. Ignores type matchups.

tonbogaeri.name: U-turn
tonbogaeri.desc: After attacking, the user switches out with a party Pokémon.

infaito.name: Close Combat
infaito.desc: After attacking, lowers the user's Defense and Sp. Def by 1 stage each.

shippegaeshi.name: Payback
shippegaeshi.desc: Power is doubled when the user moves after the target.

dameoshi.name: Assurance
dameoshi.desc: Power is doubled if the target has already taken damage this turn.

nagetsukeru.name: Fling
nagetsukeru.desc: The effect changes based on the user's held item. The thrown item is lost after use.

pawaatorikku.name: Power Trick
pawaatorikku.desc: Swaps the user's Attack and Defense stats. Stat stages are not changed.

ieki.name: Gastro Acid
ieki.desc: Nullifies the target's Ability (no effect on Abilities tied to form such as Disguise or Stance Change, and on certain signature Abilities).

manekko.name: Copycat
manekko.desc: Attacks the target with the last move that was used. The user's own moves can also be copied.

pawaasuwappu.name: Power Swap
pawaasuwappu.desc: Swaps the Attack and Sp. Atk stat stages between the user and the target.

gaadosuwappu.name: Guard Swap
gaadosuwappu.desc: Swaps the Defense and Sp. Def stat stages between the user and the target.

totteoki.name: Last Resort
totteoki.desc: This move can only be used after all of the user's other moves have been used.

nayaminotane.name: Worry Seed
nayaminotane.desc: Changes the target's Ability to Insomnia. Fails against signature Abilities such as Truant or Stance Change.

fuiuchi.name: Sucker Punch
fuiuchi.desc: A first-strike move with priority +1. Fails if the target has not chosen an attacking move.

dokunoito.name: Baneful Bunker

yakeppachi.name: Temper Flare

sourukurassh.name: Spirit Break

メトロノーム.name: Metronome
メトロノーム.effect: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It boosts moves used consecutively but only until a different move is used.

おおきなねっこ.name: Big Root
おおきなねっこ.effect: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It boosts the amount of HP the holder restores from HP-stealing moves.

こうかくレンズ.name: Wide Lens
こうかくレンズ.effect: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It’s a magnifying lens that slightly boosts the accuracy of moves.

フォーカスレンズ.name: Zoom Lens
フォーカスレンズ.effect: An item to be held by a Pokémon. If the holder moves after its target moves, its accuracy will be boosted.

ひかりのねんど.name: Light Clay
ひかりのねんど.effect: An item to be held by a Pokémon. Protective moves like Light Screen and Reflect will be effective longer.

あついいわ.name: Heat Rock
あついいわ.effect: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It extends the duration of the move Sunny Day when used by the holder.

さらさらいわ.name: Smooth Rock
さらさらいわ.effect: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It extends the duration of the move Sandstorm when used by the holder.

しめったいわ.name: Damp Rock
しめったいわ.effect: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It extends the duration of the move Rain Dance when used by the holder.

つめたいいわ.name: Icy Rock
つめたいいわ.effect: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It extends the duration of the move Hail when used by the holder.

きれいなぬけがら.name: Shed Shell
きれいなぬけがら.effect: An item to be held by a Pokémon. This discarded carapace enables the holder to switch out of battle without fail.

くろいてっきゅう.name: Iron Ball
くろいてっきゅう.effect: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It lowers Speed and allows Ground-type moves to hit Flying types and holders that are levitating.
